name: yesid-dev-design
description: yesid.dev brand foundation — tokens, motion, gates, UI, gallery. Parity anchor: yesid.dev @ 2bdb611d91749dc437c07586cb82129eabe9dfec.

scripts.build: bun run tokens:build && turbo run build
scripts.check: bun run api:check && tsc --project tsconfig.tools.json && turbo run check
scripts.ci:tokens: bun run tokens:build && git diff --exit-code packages/tokens/tokens.css apps/gallery/src/app.css packages/motion/src/tokens.ts DESIGN.md
